narrative:
Concord Township has 1,045 registered voters, with 46.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.7 percentage points.
